title: Minimalist Architectural Landmark Word Poster AI
sourceTitle: Minimalist Architectural Landmark Word Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end minimalist architectural poster for fictional modern glass library pavilion with floating roof and reflecting pool, built around Set a single word in massive bold display typography as the background, chosen to capture the essence of that building, with small descriptive text around it reflecting. Subject: fictional modern glass library pavilion with floating roof and reflecting pool appears as the centered illustrated architectural landmark or building subject, rendered with clean structural clarity and a restrained premium art-poster presence. Scene: centered building illustration over massive word LIGHT, cream white gallery poster surface sets the gallery-poster surface, background word structure, small descriptive text, and architectural color field that echo the building form. Composition: Fixed minimalist poster composition: illustrated building centered, one massive bold display word behind it, small descriptive text around the word reflecting design philosophy, restrained architectural palette extending from or integrating with the building silhouette, and ultra-premium negative space. Signature Elements: Centered landmark illustration, massive single-word background typography, small philosophy copy, restrained architectural colors, silhouette extension into the color field, premium negative space, and ultra-minimal poster polish. Style: High-end minimalist architectural art poster with refined illustration, museum-store print quality, clean structural geometry, restrained premium typography, and an elegant editorial poster finish. Color Palette: Restrained architectural palette matched to the building: cream, concrete gray, glass blue, shadow black, muted stone, soft reflection tones, and small controlled accent colors that echo the structure. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Illustrated glass, concrete, stone, metal, reflecting pool or landscape details, matte poster paper, crisp ink, and refined gallery-print surface. Typography: Set a single word in massive bold display typography as the background, chosen to capture the essence of that building, with small descriptive text around it reflecting appears as the massive background word plus concise descriptive text; typography must be bold, sparse, architectural, and integrated behind or around the building. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end minimalist architectural poster for Choose a famous architectural landmark building name as your subject and create a high-end minimalist poster., built around FORM / built silence. Subject: Choose a famous architectural landmark building name as your subject and create a high-end minimalist poster. appears as the centered illustrated architectural landmark or building subject, rendered with clean structural clarity and a restrained premium art-poster presence. Scene: massive word FORM in background, restrained small descriptive text and premium matte print finish sets the gallery-poster surface, background word structure, small descriptive text, and architectural color field that echo the building form. Composition: Fixed minimalist poster composition: illustrated building centered, one massive bold display word behind it, small descriptive text around the word reflecting design philosophy, restrained architectural palette extending from or integrating with the building silhouette, and ultra-premium negative space. Color Palette: Restrained architectural palette matched to the building: cream, concrete gray, glass blue, shadow black, muted stone, soft reflection tones, and small controlled accent colors that echo the structure. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Illustrated glass, concrete, stone, metal, reflecting pool or landscape details, matte poster paper, crisp ink, and refined gallery-print surface. Typography: FORM / built silence appears as the massive background word plus concise descriptive text; typography must be bold, sparse, architectural, and integrated behind or around the building. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
